Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's focus on 'Scholarly productivity' and 'your own research' indirectly supports innovation and productive activities (Target 8.2, 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course, 'Informetrics,' directly enhances scientific research and technological capabilities through topics like 'Mapping of scholarly fields' and 'Evaluation of journals' (Target 9.5).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' ('維護智慧財產權') supports the rule of law concerning intellectual property (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course analyzes 'Collaborative authorship' and 'Scholarly communication,' which are forms of knowledge-sharing partnerships (Target 17.6, 17.16).
